アニメーションタイプ = def
I walked in thinking about how maybe I'd pop in to see her working,
when I got to witness quite the rare sight.
\sa[124]\SE[12-nb]Ufufuh--, being able to eat dinner with my daughter makes me so happy~
Sorry, Shino-chan, we're really getting in your way, aren't we?
\sa[133]\se[13-nb]Having Shino-chan there as a feast for the eyes makes this feast taste even better~~♪
How about I have you for dessert, my - little - sister?~... Ufufuh~♪
It's still not time for the dinner rush so the owner told me
that I can take it easy for now.
It's a very rare sight to see the entire Kurumizawa household out in force like this.
With how busy Rino nee-san and Ayano oba-san are,
they don't get many chances to do this these days.
While gathering the gazes of the other customers... mostly just men,
they spent some nice and quality time together.
\SE[4-nb]I feel like it's been a while since I've had solid food like this~.
I always make do with just supplements and jelly packs...
\se[13-nb]I feel you, mama~~. When it's busy at the office, I end up
just making do with energy drinks and alcohol.
\sa[130]\SE[8]You too... I'd rather you had proper meals... You can
just tell me, I can make you food any time, you know?
\SM[double]\sa[132]\SE[30-nb]Ah yeah, mama, listen to this~. Shino-chan's gotten even
better at cooking lately. I don't think a future restaurant business
would be a bad idea, so start saving money already, okay?
\sa[122]\SE[7]It's the first I'm hearing of this!? At least ask me first!
\sa[124]\SE[10-nb]Fufuh--, seeing you two get along so well makes me so happy~
Thanks for growing up into such wonderful girls, you two.
\SE[25-nb]Gosh... I'm starting to get a bit emotional now~. Maybe my age's catching up to me~
\se[13-nb]I can only live this way because you two work so hard for my sake,
so I should be the one thanking you two, you know~?
\SE[10-nb]I'm also always thankful to you two.
...Seems that Rino nee-san noticed my presence.
\SE[6]Huh, \n[1]. ...When did you? I didn't even notice~
\SE[6-nb]Good evening, \n[2]. Ufufuh--, we showed you an embarrassing sight, huh?
\SE[2]Ah, if you haven't had dinner yet, how about you join us?
\se[22-nb]Fufuh--, good idea~. We'll let you savour a nice little slice
of VIP time surrounded by several beautiful nee-sans at once~♪
\SE[11-nb]Oh my, I'm not so young to be a 'nee-san' but... how
about it indeed? Oba-san here will treat you to a meal~
While a free meal's a free meal and it's always a welcome offer--
...Some personal things made it difficult for me to accept it.
\sa[123]\SE[8]You don't want to? That's rare, are you sure?
\se[18-nb]\sa[130]You're a part of our family at this point, \n[2],
you really don't need to hold back, you know?
\sa[133]\SE[3]That's right~, chances like these don't come often, you know~?
Isn't this basically paradise for gentlemen like you~?
Though my desire for such a delicious meal was great,
it was overshadowed by my desire to not get in between them.
Just as I was gallantly about to turn around and dash off,
...I thought of a pretty thoughtful idea, at least for me.
\se[8]\SA[123]Fueh? A picture of all 3 of us together? Eheheh,
\sa[128]\se[13-nb]It's a bit embarrassing to pose for a picture in this uniform but...
please take it for us, thanks.
\se[3]\SM[nod]\SA[133]Wow, that's some fine play, \n[2]~. You might just
manage to max out my affection meter and go for my route~♪
\SE[10-nb]Oh my, thank you, \n[2]. Fufuh--, I wonder how long it's been?
Since the last time we took a picture together like this, I mean.
Fufuh, I'm good to go here~♪ Please do it~
Oh my, what a nice photo. You might have a talent for this, \n[2]....
Ufufuh--, thanks for this nice memento.
I made them all line up together, took a photo with my phone and then left the place quickly.
Since I wanted them to spend as much time together as they could.
Wishing for their family to always stay the same forever, I left
the restaurant behind, though not without regrets over the tasty food.
Captured [Photo of the Kurumizawas] with your phone.
(You can now view the related flashback event from your home computer)

This place is just great, isn't it? Cheap, cute, and tasty, the whole package really.
I feel you~, I always stop by whenever I come around here.
Hey, which one do you like the most?
All of them are cute but, isn't that 'big' night shift girl the best?
I'm almost done conquering the entire menu here!
It's hard to get bored of though, isn't it?~ This place is like an oasis for my soul.
I wonder if the cooking's done by a cute girl too?
Probably~, I bet you it's some real cool beauty!
I wonder if they'll let me take a photo here...
I feel you, the girls are just too high level, aren't they?...
Alright, I've decided! I'm going to apply for a job here!
Oh, sounds cool. Maybe I'll join you.
Both the girls here and their uniforms are very high level~!
They're all cute, but the brown haired girl with the night shift's the best.
I want to screw her while she's got that uniform on...!
I wonder if the uniforms are the owner's doing? Feel like he'd make a good drinking buddy.
Maybe I'll give my number to that waitress here...
Okay~, please do wait a moment while we prepare the order~!
The owner doesn't look like much but, his cooking skills are nothing to scoff at...

Late nights are great, the pay is great and the work is relaxed~
Would you like to settle the bill?
The uniform here's so cute, I love it~
We get a whole lot of male customers, though it's not like I don't get why...
